message:
Analyze this email and determine if it contains loan-related information.

Email Subject: Rajendra, follow Shivam Garg - Software Engineer III at Google
Email Content: Rajendra, add interesting content to your feed. Here are a few recommendations to get started. https://www.linkedin.com/comm/mynetwork/discovery-see-all/?usecase=EMAIL_MIXED_RECOMMENDATIONS&lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_edge_discover_01%3B%2BkiZr7a7SLeeY7LPIoVmHg%3D%3D&midToken=AQFMjYnuODQXdg&midSig=3VrilZq3QdGc41&trk=eml-email_edge_discover_01-see_all-0-cta~text&trkEmail=eml-email_edge_discover_01-see_all-0-cta~text-null-10ivnq~mk9hnmti~eq-null-null&eid=10ivnq-mk9hnmti-eq&otpToken=MTQwNDFkZTQxNTJlYzhjMGJlMmYwMmVjNGUxZmU1YjU4ZWNlZDk0ODk5YWY4NTZkNzljNjAxNjY0ZTVmNWJmNWZjZDM4YTg5MWJmNWZlZDY3OTM2NGFkMjU0MWZlZWQ2MWM2ZmVkZGQyZGE4MWY0Njg4LDEsMQ%3D%3D

Determine if this is:
1. A quarterly loan summary (contains outstanding balance, principal paid, interest paid, EMI details)
2. An interest rate change notification (contains old rate, new rate, effective date)
3. Other loan-related email
4. Not a loan email

Return ONLY a JSON object with:
{
  "isLoanEmail": true or false,
  "emailType": "quarterly-summary" | "interest-rate-change" | "other",
  "confidence": number between 0 and 1
}
systemPrompt: You are a financial email analyzer. Analyze emails and determine if they contain loan information. Return ONLY valid JSON with "isLoanEmail" (boolean), "emailType" (string), and "confidence" (number 0-1) fields.
